faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: What business owners ask most often

items.q: How does remote IT operations work in practice?
items.a: Using modern technologies – secure remote access tools – we continuously monitor, maintain, and intervene. Most tasks can be performed without an on-site visit, so you don't need to deal with the daily operation of your IT systems.

items.q: What size businesses do you work with?
items.a: We primarily provide IT operations services for micro-businesses up to smaller manufacturing companies. Exact pricing depends on infrastructure size, which our smart needs assessment questionnaire helps determine.

items.q: What if I only need one-time help, not a long-term contract?
items.a: We gladly accept one-time requests. Development, maintenance, or troubleshooting tasks can be performed without a contract.

items.q: Does the smart needs assessment give a real price quote?
items.a: After completing the questionnaire, you'll receive an approximate operations fee estimate. This is not a final offer, but provides a good starting point for discussions.

items.q: What's the difference between SIRONIC and SIRO-VÉD?
items.a: SIRONIC is the main brand for IT and technology services. SIRO-VÉD is the separate online brand for security technology services (camera systems, alarms, fire detection) with its own website at siroved.hu.

items.q: How do you help with NIS2 compliance?
items.a: Together with our trusted consulting partner, we plan and implement the IT system expected by the NIS2 directive, prepare you for the audit, and provide ongoing operational cooperation after the audit.

items.q: Do you build custom websites or CMS-based ones (e.g. WordPress)?
items.a: We exclusively build custom-developed solutions. We don't use template-based CMS platforms – every project is tailored to the client's needs and branding, from design to backend.

items.q: How quickly can I get in touch and start a project?
items.a: After filling in the smart contact or needs assessment form, we typically respond within 1 business day. For urgent matters, we provide a separate one-time incident report form.

footer.tagline: IT Solutions. Custom Development. Reliable Networks.

itOps.metaDescription: Reliable remote IT operations for micro-businesses to small manufacturers. Monthly contract, fast response, no surprises.
itOps.heroTitle: IT Systems Operations – reliable IT support, without the headaches
itOps.heroSubtitle: We manage your entire IT infrastructure remotely. No unnecessary on-site visits, no unexpected downtime – just continuous, reliable operation day after day.
itOps.introTitle: What does this mean in practice?
itOps.introText: IT operations is the work that keeps running even when no one notices – software updates, backups, access management, network monitoring. SIRONIC takes over this entire process so you can focus on your business.

benefits.title: Predictable monthly cost
benefits.text: No surprise invoices. Fixed monthly fee based on infrastructure size.

benefits.title: Proactive mindset
benefits.text: We don't just react to problems – we prevent them before they cause issues.

benefits.title: Fast response
benefits.text: When something goes wrong, you don't wait weeks. We intervene quickly.

benefits.title: No need for an in-house IT team
benefits.text: Save on a full-time IT specialist while getting professional support.

itOps.whoText: Primarily for businesses that cannot or do not want to maintain an internal IT team, but want reliable, continuous background support.
whoItems: Anyone tired of dealing with recurring IT issues

processSteps.title: Assessment
processSteps.text: We assess your infrastructure, devices and needs – online via our smart questionnaire.

processSteps.title: Contract and setup
processSteps.text: We set the monthly fee, configure monitoring and remote access tools.

processSteps.title: Ongoing operations
processSteps.text: We handle system monitoring. You work, we handle the IT background.

whyItems: We keep it simple – no unnecessary complexity
One-time requests welcome – no long-term contract required
Flexible solutions tailored to local business needs
itOps.ctaTitle: Find out what IT operations will cost you
itOps.ctaSubtitle: Fill in our smart needs assessment and get an approximate monthly price – no obligation.
itOps.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions about IT operations

faqItems.q: Do you need to come on-site?
faqItems.a: Most tasks are performed remotely via secure, encrypted connections. Physical visits are rare – only necessary for hardware replacements.

faqItems.q: What's exactly included in the monthly fee?
faqItems.a: The base monthly fee covers system monitoring, software update management, backup verification and general maintenance. Developments and physical interventions are billed separately.

faqItems.q: What if I only need one-time help?
faqItems.a: We gladly accept one-time requests too. No mandatory contract required.

faqItems.q: What systems can you operate?
faqItems.a: Windows and Linux servers, office workstations, cloud-based systems (Microsoft 365, Google Workspace) and network devices.

faqItems.q: How much does it approximately cost?
faqItems.a: The price depends on your infrastructure size. Fill in our smart questionnaire for an approximate estimate.

network.metaDescription: Stable, secure corporate network installation and development. Business network planning, WiFi systems, VPN and structured cabling.
network.heroTitle: Network building and development – a solid foundation for your business
network.heroSubtitle: A poorly designed network causes daily problems. SIRONIC builds and develops stable, secure and scalable network infrastructure.
network.introTitle: Why does a well-designed network matter?
network.introText: The corporate network is the foundation of your IT systems. If it's unstable, everything suffers: slow internet, outages, security risks. A well-planned network pays off long-term.
network.benefitsTitle: What do we do during network installation?

benefits.title: Network planning
benefits.text: We assess your needs and site, then design the optimal network structure.

benefits.title: Structured cabling
benefits.text: Physical cable network, patch panels, switch and router configuration – clean and documented.

benefits.title: WiFi systems
benefits.text: Reliable wireless coverage across your entire office or facility.

benefits.title: VPN and secure access
benefits.text: Secure remote access to company systems, from anywhere.

network.whoText: Any business where the network is currently problematic, outdated, or needs expansion – we also help private clients.
whoItems: Where WiFi is unreliable or slow
Private clients with home network issues

processSteps.title: On-site assessment
processSteps.text: We visit the site, review existing infrastructure and discuss your needs.

processSteps.title: Planning and quote
processSteps.text: We prepare the network plan and itemized quote – transparently.

processSteps.title: Installation
processSteps.text: We build the network, configure devices and hand it over with documentation.

whyItems: We don't overcomplicate – we build only what's truly needed
Documented, organized network handed over at completion
We stand behind the installed system
network.ctaSubtitle: A brief consultation reveals the best solution for your situation.
network.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions about network building

faqItems.q: Does the entire network need to be replaced?
faqItems.a: Not necessarily. After assessment we decide what works well and only intervene where truly needed.

faqItems.q: How long does a typical office network installation take?
faqItems.a: For a smaller office (10–20 workstations) physical installation typically takes 1–2 days.

faqItems.q: Do you handle WiFi problems too?
faqItems.a: Yes. Poorly placed routers, weak signal, interference – we assess and solve these, including access point networks.

faqItems.q: Can you set up VPN as well?
faqItems.a: Yes, we configure secure VPN connections so your team can securely access company systems remotely.

faqItems.q: Do you work with private clients too?
faqItems.a: Yes, we're happy to help private clients with home network issues.

nis2.metaTitle: NIS2 Compliance and IT System Implementation | SIRONIC
nis2.metaDescription: NIS2-compliant IT system planning, implementation and operation. Audit preparation, documentation and ongoing operational cooperation.
nis2.heroTitle: NIS2-compliant IT system – compliance, without the unnecessary stress
nis2.heroSubtitle: The NIS2 directive brings new obligations for many businesses. SIRONIC helps you comply – clearly, step by step.
nis2.introTitle: What is NIS2, and who does it affect?
nis2.introText: NIS2 (Network and Information Security Directive 2) is the EU's cybersecurity directive, becoming mandatory in Hungary from 2024. It primarily affects medium and large enterprises in certain sectors, but its effects can ripple to smaller companies too.
nis2.benefitsTitle: What does SIRONIC do in the NIS2 process?

benefits.title: IT system planning
benefits.text: We design NIS2-compliant IT infrastructure tailored to your business.

benefits.title: Implementation
benefits.text: We configure and deploy necessary systems, processes and security measures.

benefits.title: Audit preparation
benefits.text: We help with audit documentation and meeting compliance requirements.

benefits.title: Ongoing operational cooperation
benefits.text: We don't leave you after the audit – continuous IT operations maintain compliance.

nis2.whoText: Businesses for which NIS2 is mandatory, or those who want to proactively manage compliance risks.
whoItems: Those who have already received audit preparation tasks

processSteps.title: Situation analysis
processSteps.text: We assess your current IT system and identify gaps against NIS2 requirements.

processSteps.title: Planning and implementation
processSteps.text: Together with our trusted consulting partner, we develop and implement necessary changes.

processSteps.title: Audit preparation and handover
processSteps.text: We prepare documentation, ready processes for audit and hand over operations.

whyItems: We work with a trusted NIS2 consulting partner
We don't just advise – we implement and operate too
We communicate clearly, not in legal jargon
We stay with you after the audit too
nis2.ctaTitle: Not sure where to start with NIS2 compliance?
nis2.ctaSubtitle: Let's connect – a brief consultation will clarify what steps are needed in your case.

faqItems.q: Does NIS2 apply to me?
faqItems.a: NIS2 is mandatory primarily for medium and large enterprises in affected sectors (energy, healthcare, transport, digital infrastructure, etc.). If unsure, ask us – we'll help figure it out.

faqItems.q: What happens if I don't comply with NIS2?
faqItems.a: Non-compliance can carry serious penalties – including regulatory fines and reputational risks. Starting preparation early is advisable.

faqItems.q: How long does NIS2 compliance take?
faqItems.a: It depends on the current state of your systems. Typically a 3–6 month process, though it can be shorter or longer depending on how much needs to change.

faqItems.q: Do you handle the entire process yourselves?
faqItems.a: The technical side (IT system, implementation, operations) yes. Legal and compliance consulting is done together with our partner firm.

faqItems.q: What should I bring to the first consultation?
faqItems.a: Nothing special. A brief description of your business, industry and current IT infrastructure is enough. We'll handle the rest.

webDev.metaTitle: Custom Website and System Development | SIRONIC
webDev.metaDescription: Fully custom website and business system development. No WordPress, no templates – only solutions tailored to your needs, from design to backend.
webDev.heroTitle: Custom web development – no templates, built for your needs
webDev.heroSubtitle: Not WordPress, not Wix. Every project is uniquely designed and developed from start to finish – tailored to your brand, goals and workflows.
webDev.introTitle: What is custom development, and why is it better?
webDev.introText: Template-based systems (WordPress, Wix, Shopify) are fast but limited. If you want exactly what you envision – not just what the template allows – you need custom development. SIRONIC builds every project from scratch, from design to backend.

benefits.title: Presentation websites
benefits.text: Modern, fast, SEO-friendly websites – unique design, unique content.

benefits.title: Webshops
benefits.text: Fully custom e-commerce solutions that fit your exact sales process.

benefits.title: Internal business systems
benefits.text: Custom CRMs, order managers, internal portals – any business process can be digitized.

benefits.title: Web-based applications
benefits.text: Complex, interactive applications running in the browser – mobile and desktop compatible.

webDev.whoText: Anyone for whom template solutions aren't enough – because their needs are unique or their brand demands it.
whoItems: Companies wanting to digitize unique workflows
Startups wanting a professional online presence
Anyone who wants a truly custom website, not a template

processSteps.title: Requirements and planning
processSteps.text: We discuss goals, target audience, features and branding. A concrete plan follows.

processSteps.title: Design and development
processSteps.text: We create the design, then after your approval we start development.

processSteps.title: Testing and handover
processSteps.text: We thoroughly test, then hand over – and help with further development if needed.

whyItems: Template-free development – every project is unique
Flexible scalability – the system grows with your business
Referenceable work – you can view our previous projects
webDev.ctaTitle: Got an idea? Let's build it together.
webDev.ctaSubtitle: Get in touch – we'll discuss your needs and prepare a quote.
webDev.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions about web development

faqItems.q: Why not use WordPress?
faqItems.a: WordPress is good for simple blogs and smaller sites. But for custom features, specific design or complex business logic, custom development is more reliable, faster and safer long-term.

faqItems.q: How long does a website take to build?
faqItems.a: A simple presentation site is typically 2–4 weeks. A more complex system or webshop is 6–12 weeks. Exact timeframes after requirements assessment.

faqItems.q: How much does a custom website cost?
faqItems.a: The price depends on complexity and features. A presentation site and an e-commerce store are different categories. We'll give you an exact number after a quote request.

faqItems.q: Can you operate the finished site?
faqItems.a: Yes, if you need it. We offer maintenance, operations and updates after development – even on a monthly contract.

faqItems.q: Can I edit the content myself?
faqItems.a: Yes. If needed, we'll build an admin interface where you can modify texts, images and products yourself – without programming knowledge.
